title: onebang
description: gate a bang with a bang

messages.description: any message is treated as a bang
any message is treated as a bang
allows a bang in the left inlet through left outlet once
if a bang was sent before to the right inlet

arguments.description: non-0 lets the first bang on left inlet through

body: [onebang] allows a bang in the left inlet to pass through the left outlet once ONLY if a bang has been previously received in the right inlet. The bang goes to the right outlet otherwise.
